title: Working with Data
description: Store and organise collections of values with lists, tuples, dictionaries, and sets, and handle text with confidence.

lessons.title: Lists and Tuples
objectives: Modify lists with append, insert, remove, and pop
Explain how a tuple differs from a list and when to use each

lessons.title: Dictionaries and Sets
objectives: Store and look up key/value data with dictionaries
Access keys safely with get() and loop with items()
Use sets for unique values and fast membership tests

lessons.title: Working with Strings
objectives: Index and slice strings like sequences
Transform text with common string methods
